title: ship-result
description: The terminal read-out of a ship-it run: shipped (with the merged sha) or needs-human (with the real error).

brief.description: The scoped task that was delivered.

shipped_sha.description: The merged commit on main (set only when status=shipped).

last_error.description: The real failure (set only when status=needs-human) — never a swallowed false success.
